title: alniaria folgneri
intro: Alniaria folgneri, also known as Alder Buckthorn or Alnus incana, is a flowering plant species within the birch family Betulaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of alkaloids and flavonoids, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Alniaria folgneri is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits such as soothing inflammation and promoting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea, used in infusions, or processed into a tincture to leverage its medicinal properties.
